personal.name: Sahil
personal.bio: A passionate developer with a knack for creating beautiful and functional web applications. Experienced in modern web technologies and always eager to learn new things.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
education.description: Acquiring advanced proficiency in computer science fundamentals, focusing on full-stack architecture, data structures, and algorithmic optimization for high-performance systems.
Specialized in the Science stream (PCM), achieving 78.2%. Developed a strong mathematical foundation and analytical problem-solving skills.
Completed foundational schooling with a score of 70%, focusing on core sciences and nurturing an early interest in technology and computer systems.

experience.description: Developing and maintaining front-end components using React and Tailwind CSS. Collaborating with senior developers on large-scale projects.
Managed and scaled social media platforms by creating engaging content, optimizing performance through analytics, and driving audience growth through strategic digital campaigns.
Led community awareness programs on the Greenhouse Effect and sustainability, educating local groups on climate change mitigation and eco-friendly practices.
Completed intensive training in Data Structures and Algorithms using Java, focusing on problem-solving efficiency and scalable code architecture.

timeline.title: Foundation & Web Basics
timeline.description: Began the journey with core logic and web structures.

timeline.title: Data & Performance
timeline.description: Deep dived into algorithms and database management systems.

timeline.title: Full Stack Development
timeline.description: Architecting complete ecosystems and dynamic user experiences.

timeline.title: Modern Scale & Future
timeline.description: Focusing on scalable microservices and real-time connectivity.

projects.title: Video Downloader
projects.description: A high-performance media utility for downloading videos from multiple platforms with a focus on speed and ease of use.

projects.title: Chit Chat
projects.description: A real-time chatting website built for seamless peer-to-peer communication with encrypted message handling.

certificates.title: Data Structure and Algorithm using Java

services.title: Full Stack Development
services.description: Building scalable, performant web applications from scratch using modern stacks like MERN and Next.js.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Crafting intuitive, user-centric interfaces with a focus on glassmorphism and modern design systems.

services.title: API Integration
services.description: Developing and integrating robust RESTful and GraphQL APIs for seamless data flow between systems.

services.title: Tech Consulting
services.description: Providing strategic advice on architecture, specialized in performance optimization and cloud scaling.

testimonials.name: Dr. Rajesh Verma
testimonials.content: Sahil is a very good student and has a bright future ahead.

testimonials.name: Mr. BhikaRam Yadav
testimonials.content: A highly dedicated volunteer. Sahil's work in raising awareness about the Greenhouse effect was both impactful and creatively executed.

testimonials.name: Cipher Instructor
testimonials.content: One of the standout performers in our training. Sahil's problem-solving approach in Java was consistently logic-driven and highly efficient.
